itemtip.bomb.tip: A bomb that explodes violently remotely with a detonator. The bomb has a powerful antenna, so it can be activated from a distance of %%s blocks! It can be defused with wire cutters.
itemtip.c4.tip: A highly explosive bomb, perfect for destroying buildings. It can be defused with wire cutters.
itemtip.detonator.controls.label: Controls (CTRL)
itemtip.detonator.tip: Can remotely (up to %%s blocks) activate a tied bomb.
itemtip.mine.tip: A mine that explodes violently when carelessly interacting with it. It can be defused with wire cutters.
itemtip.screwdriver.tip: A useful tool that allows you to unscrew nails. It is required in order to defuse explosives.
itemtip.wire_cutters.tip: A useful tool that allows you to defuse any explosives. Use with caution!
messages.detonator.defused: You can't tie a detonator to a defused bomb!
messages.detonator.limit: The bomb limit has been reached!
messages.detonator.tied: The detonator is successfully tied to the bomb at
messages.detonator.untied: The detonator is untied from the bomb!
messages.detonator.untied_all: The detonator is untied from all bombs!
